_doc: 1000-tick variant of the IO Profile Runner config — a faster-producing cousin of ioprofile-2k.json. Halves every iterative stage's tick budget and cuts the Versioned entity count in half, which in turn halves the event count of the final readBurst tick (target ~1M events instead of the 2k variant's ~2M). Use with: dotnet run -c Release -- ioprofile-1k.json. Output lands at ioprofile-1k.typhon-trace alongside the 2k-variant trace.

database._doc: Same 32 MB cache as the 2k variant. With ~130K Versioned entities the cache still churns enough to produce sustained DiskRead/DiskWrite + PageEvicted activity across the spawnCheckpointLoop stage — just less of it over 250 ticks instead of 500.

workload._doc: Stage budget — total ~1001 ticks: 1 + 1 + 250 + 250 + 250 + 247 + 1 + 1 = 1001. Each non-one-shot stage runs one iteration per tick, producing a steady signal across half the timeline of the 2k variant.

spawnBurst._comment: Same one-shot warm-up as the 2k variant — 5K entities in the first tick. Identical initial spike on every track so side-by-side comparison with the 2k trace is easy.

spawnCheckpointLoop._comment: 250 iterations × 500 entities = 125K Versioned entities across 250 ticks (was 500/250K in the 2k variant). Halving the entity count is the primary lever for halving the final readBurst tick's event count, since readBurst walks every live entity and emits a page-cache event chain per read.

txFlood._comment: 250 ticks × 50 independent commits per tick = 12.5K commits. Keeps the Tx+UoW gauge's per-tick rate lines at the same plateau as the 2k variant — just for half the duration.

gcChurn._comment: 250 ticks × 8K Hashtable entries per tick. Same per-tick intensity as the 2k variant — produces periodic Gen1/Gen2 collections without any single tick's duration dominating.

transientChurn._comment: 247 × 80 = ~20K transient spawns across 247 ticks → ~280 component-segment pages, well under the 1024-page ceiling from Issue #244. The Transient Store gauge climbs monotonically then flattens, same shape as the 2k variant at half the scale.

readBurst._comment: Single one-shot read pass. With ~130K live Versioned entities (5K from spawnBurst + 125K from the loop) and ~4 page-cache events per read, this produces the heavy final tick (~500K-1M events depending on cache churn). That's roughly 50% of the 2k variant's last-tick event count — the explicit request that drove this config.

profile._doc: Identical to the 2k variant's opt-in set.
